lines.speaker: Lilifang
lines.text: Hello there. Welcome to the Grand Library.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hmm. I thought it was bigger.

lines.speaker: Lilifang
lines.text: Oh it is. While we've opened up the city to other races, we've decided that most of the library will remain a place for elves only.

lines.speaker: Lilifang
lines.text: That said, we still want visitors to get a taste of what the library has to offer. For that reason, we've opened up this small section of it.

lines.speaker: Lilifang
lines.text: Feel free to have a read through the books here. Now that the city is open to visitors, we've had lots of new additions from far and wide.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Sounds great, I'll take a look.
